heading: Required Access
body:
To use MFA (multi-factor authentication), an [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>) must enable it for
their organization. All members of that organization must enable
MFA (multi-factor authentication) for their accounts.

After MFA (multi-factor authentication) is enabled for an organization, Atlas prompts those
organization members who haven't enabled MFA (multi-factor authentication) to set it up on their next
login. If an organization member doesn't enable MFA (multi-factor authentication), they won't be able
to access the organization.
